name: 格雷格
specialAbility: Mercenary Instinct: first attack has advantage; all attacks have advantage when protecting 小莉
description: 退役佣兵，碎盾亭酒馆老板。六尺二，右眉旧疤。二十年前的战斗本能仍在。

name: 艾琳娜
specialAbility: Foresight: cannot be surprised; once per combat forces attacker to reroll a hit
description: 340岁高等精灵，冒险者公会会长。占卜魔法使她几乎无法被偷袭。

name: 韩猛
specialAbility: Iron Grip: grapple attacks have advantage; grappled targets take 1d4 crushing per round
description: 独臂战士，公会管理员。左手之力足以掰断桌腿。

name: 格罗姆
specialAbility: Forge-Hardened: fire resistance; below half HP attacks deal +2 extra damage
description: 矮人铁匠，脾气火爆。铁锤在手，力大无穷。

name: 卡恩
specialAbility: Void Resonance: on hit, DC 14 WIS save or frightened 1 turn; once per combat can become invisible 1 round
description: 游吟诗人外表下的暗影教团执行者。黑木琴是虚空法器。

name: 维克多
specialAbility: Desperate Plea: below 4 HP cries out about kidnapped daughter, revealing critical plot info
description: 镇长，被暗影教团胁迫。憔悴无力，毫无战斗能力。

name: 陈妈
specialAbility: Loud Alarm: immediately alerts all NPCs in town; 格雷格 arrives in 2 rounds
description: 旅店老板娘，消息灵通。虽无战斗力但嗓门大到能震醒半个镇。

name: 叶绿
specialAbility: Herbalist Defense: once per combat throw blinding powder (DC 12 DEX or blinded 1 round); carries 1 self-heal potion
description: 半精灵药剂师，知晓自然魔法。温柔但并非毫无自保之力。

name: 小莉
specialAbility: Spirit Sight: senses hidden/invisible enemies; immune to mind control and fear; can reveal disguised creatures
description: 12岁灵视者。不会战斗，攻击她将触发格雷格永久仇恨。
